top_signals.title: ‘Communication challenge, nothing more’: Standard Chartered keeps $100,000 bitcoin target, calls Strategy selloff a signaling problem
top_signals.summary: Standard Chartered retained its $100,000 end-2026 bitcoin target, calling Strategy's STRC pivot a signaling problem, not a solvency one.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Foreign Ownership of UK Firms Soared 35% Amid Glut of Deals
top_signals.summary: The number of British companies controlled by overseas firms soared 35% in the years after the outbreak of Covid, as cheap valuations drove a dealmaking boom.

top_signals.title: Baltic Dry Index climbs to 2944 up 34 points
top_signals.summary: Today, Friday, July 10 2026, the Baltic Dry Index climbed 34 points, reaching 2944 points. Baltic Dry Index is compiled by the London-based Baltic Exchange and covers prices for transported cargo such as coal, grain and iron ore. The index is based on a daily survey of agents all over the world. Baltic Dry hit ...
